meaning: adj.擦亮的,磨光的,精练的,优美的,无暇的
examples: The dark polished wood shone like glass.
The dentist scaled and polished my teeth.
He beat the rugs and polished the silver.
Using computerized measuring equipment, the AGS verified that each stone was cut and polished to rigorous standards.
The elegant and convivial Royal Mile Tavern works its charms well, with polished wood, brass and mirrors.
